ddls:
CREATE TABLE "chromosomes" (
  "chr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the chromosome */,
  "chr_number" INTEGER /* Chromosome number */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Chromosome length in base pairs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genetic_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the genetic variant */,
  "chr_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the chromosome table */,
  "snp_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the SNP table */,
  "bp" INTEGER /* Base pair position on the chromosome */,
  "a1" TEXT /* Allele 1 */,
  "a2" TEXT /* Allele 2 */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test performed */,
  "nmiss" INTEGER /* Number of missing values */,
  "beta" REAL /* Effect size (beta) */,
  "stat" REAL /* Test statistic */,
  "p" REAL /* P-value */,
  "sig_0.05" INTEGER /* Significance at 0.05 level */,
  "sig_0.01" INTEGER /* Significance at 0.01 level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Variant creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Variant update timestamp */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of user who created the variant */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of user who last updated the variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "snps" (
  "snp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the SNP */,
  "snp_name" TEXT /* Name of the SNP */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("snp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Dataset creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Dataset update timestamp */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of user who created the dataset */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of user who last updated the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_dataset_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the link */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the genetic variants table */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the variant datasets table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* User's role (e.g., admin, researcher, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the history entry */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the genetic variants table */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the change occurred */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., update, delete, etc.) */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the changed field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the changed field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the comment */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the genetic variants table */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id")
)
